title: Video capability on Android
excerpt: Through the Monday app on mobile, you are able to take pictures, but you are only able to take videos on iphone, but on Android, you have to take the video on your regular phone and then upload it, which is very cumberso…

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml: Through the Monday app on mobile, you are able to take pictures, but you are only able to take videos on iphone, but on Android, you have to take the video on your regular phone and then upload it, which is very cumbersome. Could we please get this wokring on Android?
